Results for 'top attractions, sights and restaurants Cologne Germany' in Cologne, Germany:
1. Cologne Cathedral [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.8 (2200 reviews)
   📍 Domkloster 4
   "It was the top highlight of my visit to Cologne!"
2. Museum Ludwig [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.5 (9300 reviews)
   📍 Heinrich-Böll-Platz
   "This is a “don't miss stop” on your visit to Cologne (Köln), Germany."
3. Rheingarten [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.5 (8100 reviews)
   📍 Rheinpromenade Altstadt
   "Can recommend a visit when in Cologne."
4. Fish Market [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.4 (2000 reviews)
   📍 Am Leystapel
   "Recommended instead of spending time in the inner part of Cologne."
5. Wallraf-Richartz-Museum & Fondation Corboud [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.6 (3400 reviews)
   📍 Obenmarspforten 40
   "A must-visit in Cologne."
